task_text: Draft the Commerce pickup/delivery ordering design doc (design only, no implementation): drift-check tag extends-Hermes, Hermes-first analysis, new primitives, reconciliation of existing payment/catering-deposit-oriented commerce primitives with the new pickup/delivery order loop, POS-first analysis (Square/Clover/Toast/Shopify), Cockpit-first decision (read-only Order Cockpit first; POS sync later adapter), operator-gated items, explicit non-goals, slices A-F. Codex-reviewed before any build.
